title: cynoglossum officinale var. sylvaticum
intro: Cynoglossum officinale var. sylvaticum, also known as woodland hound's tongue or wild hound's tongue, is a variety of the Cynoglossum officinale plant, a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cynoglossum officinale var. sylvaticum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb for treating colds and flu. Cynoglossum officinale var. sylvaticum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
